title: Metallic Balloons, 6 PCS 18 Inch Thick Chrome Metallic Silver Balloons Helium Shiny Balloon for Birthday Baby Shower Wedding Anniversary Festival Carnival Party Decorations (Silver)
features: THE IMPORTANT: The metallic silver balloon will have a slightly different color before and after inflation. Please DO NOT overfill the balloon and AVOID sunburn or overheating which could cause the balloon to BURST. Balloons are suitable for children OVER 8 years old.

ABOUT US: We are enthusiastic sellers of balloon party decorations and can provide you with balloons in a variety of beautiful colors to make your party more memorable. Metallic latex balloons are a new trend, perfect for baby showers, kids birthday parties and other rave party decorations.

ABOUT THE PRODUCT: The 18 inch birthday balloon is made of high quality latex and is safe to use around children. The metallic balloons come in glossy and chrome colors and are the perfect decoration for kids' parties. Each latex balloon weighs 10 grams and is brighter than regular latex balloons.

ABOUT THE PACKAGE: The Birthday Latex Balloons Set includes 6 silver party balloons and 1 roll of white ribbon to give your party a special color. This balloon set is vacuum packed to avoid balloon oxidation and color distortion. Therefore, it needs to be ventilated for half an hour before use to disperse the latex smell.

WHAT WE CAN DO: If the balloons do not meet your need, our customer service is free-hassle for you to resolve your issue. You can click "seller contact" button in your Amazon account to email us to get money back or new one.
